error_signature: Airtable Trigger not firing in testing mode
title: Airtable Trigger not firing in testing mode
symptom: The Airtable Trigger node does not fire as expected in testing mode, despite correct configuration.
root_cause: The Airtable Trigger node may behave differently in testing mode compared to production mode. This can lead to unexpected results where triggers do not fire as anticipated during testing.
fix_steps: Switch the workflow from testing mode to production mode
Wait a few minutes for the trigger to start working
agent_instruction: Switch to production mode and wait for the trigger to function properly.
